description_long: This is a plush toy resembling a stylized rabbit with exaggerated features, including large upright ears and a rounded body. The toy's face is hollow and dark, with visible teeth and eye sockets, giving it a slightly mechanical or animatronic appearance. Its limbs are stubby and rounded, with rainbow-colored accents on the paws and feet, adding a playful and colorful touch. The toy wears a black bow tie and has two black buttons on its chest, as well as a green ribbon or scarf tied around its neck. The surface appears soft and fabric-like, typical of stuffed toys, with visible seams and a matte finish. The overall design is whimsical, blending elements of a classic stuffed animal with a slightly eerie, robotic twist.
description: A plush rabbit toy with large ears, rainbow-accented paws, a black bow tie, and a hollow, animatronic-style face. It features a soft, fabric surface and playful, colorful details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the hollow face, large ears, black bow tie, buttons, and rainbow-colored paws.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the open mouth, protruding teeth, and the side profile of the ears and limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, body, and ears, with the green ribbon visible on the side.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the open mouth, teeth, and the rainbow accents on the limbs from a different angle.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial area is hollow and dark, with no visible eyes or mouth expression, giving it a blank, slightly eerie appearance. The open mouth reveals rounded teeth, but there is no clear emotional expression.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with both arms and legs slightly spread, ears pointing upward, and head facing forward.
